aboutSection.title: About Company
aboutSection.imageAlt: Take & Bring logistics depot with delivery fleet and warehouse operations
aboutSection.paragraph1: For more than 20 years, we have been a trusted partner in optimizing every part of transport and logistics for customers worldwide. Our foundation is built on deep industry expertise, innovative technology, and an unwavering commitment to absolute reliability. At TimeZone, we approach your logistics challenges with passion and precision to secure our shared success.
aboutSection.paragraph2: Our core competencies focus on delivering high-performance solutions:
aboutSection.competencyCourierText: Fast express and direct delivery solutions
aboutSection.competencyFreightText: Efficient handling of classic part loads (LTL) and full loads (FTL)
aboutSection.competencyRefrigeratedText: State-of-the-art active temperature control for sensitive cargo
aboutSection.competencyCustomText: Tailor-made CRM contract logistics designed for your specific requirements
aboutSection.paragraph3: Our goal is to create a clear economic advantage for your business through seamless process optimization and first-class supply chain management.
aboutSection.experienceSubLabel: We have more than years of experience
aboutSection.missionsText: To deliver excellence in global freight forwarding by relying on a team of passionate experts and providing a customer-focused, professional experience.
aboutSection.visionText: To become the partner of choice in the freight forwarding industry by delivering sustainable, innovative solutions and an unmatched, customer-centric collaboration.

servicesSection.serviceDescription: Flexible and efficient road transportation across local and international routes.
servicesSection.offerFreightDesc: Efficient transport solutions for national and international goods deliveries.
servicesSection.offerRefrigeratedDesc: Temperature-controlled transport for sensitive and chilled goods.
servicesSection.offerCourierDesc: Fast and reliable delivery of documents, parcels, and shipments.
servicesSection.offerFixedRoutesDesc: Regular transport solutions on fixed routes for predictable deliveries.
servicesSection.offerLocalDeliveriesDesc: Fast and flexible deliveries within cities and regional areas.
servicesSection.offerInternationalDesc: Safe and reliable transport for international shipments across Europe and beyond.
servicesSection.expressServicesSubtitle: Fast and reliable transport solutions for urgent shipments across Germany and Europe. Our team ensures your goods arrive safely, on time, and efficiently.
servicesSection.expressCourierDesc: Fast delivery of documents, parcels, and shipments for businesses that need dependable transport.
servicesSection.expressDirectDesc: Plannable transport solutions for businesses with regular deliveries on recurring routes.
servicesSection.refrigeratedDesc: Temperature-controlled transport for goods that require a stable cold chain throughout the journey.
servicesSection.localDeliveriesDesc: Efficient transport solutions for fast deliveries within cities and surrounding regions.

shippingDetailsSection.title: Fixed route contracts
shippingDetailsSection.subtitle: For businesses that need regular, predictable deliveries, our fixed-route transport provides a reliable logistics solution. We organize defined routes and consistent delivery times so goods can be moved efficiently and without delays.
shippingDetailsSection.feature1Text: Reliable deliveries on fixed routes to support daily business operations.
shippingDetailsSection.feature2Text: Structured route planning for on-time pickups and deliveries.
shippingDetailsSection.feature3Text: Transport solutions for businesses with regularly recurring shipments.
shippingDetailsSection.feature4Text: Experienced drivers ensure safe, punctual deliveries.
shippingDetailsSection.feature5Text: Optimized stops to improve overall transport efficiency.
shippingDetailsSection.feature6Text: Clear communication and shipment tracking for better visibility of deliveries.
shippingDetailsSection.considerationsSubtitle: To ensure efficient and reliable deliveries, we consider several key factors when planning our transport routes. This helps businesses reduce delays and make their logistics processes more efficient.
shippingDetailsSection.ctaPrompt: Ready to optimize your daily routes?
shippingDetailsSection.ctaText: Share your route, frequency, and time windows — we’ll prepare an offer tailored to your fixed route contracts.

trackingSection.title: All-in-one tracking app
trackingSection.subtitle: Manage and track your shipments anytime with our mobile tracking solution. Businesses can monitor deliveries, follow transport status, and gain full visibility throughout the entire transport process.
trackingSection.trackSubtitle: Enter your tracking number for real-time status
trackingSection.dashboardImageAlt: Fleet tracking dashboard with live vehicle map
trackingSection.feature1Text: Track shipments and vehicles in real time during transport.
trackingSection.feature2Text: Digital confirmation after successful delivery of the shipment.
trackingSection.feature3Text: Secure proof of delivery with digital signatures.
trackingSection.feature4Text: Photo proof of delivery for full transparency.
trackingSection.feature5Text: Accurate arrival times for better delivery planning.
trackingSection.feature6Text: Instant updates on the status of your shipments.
trackingSection.feature7Text: Efficient planning of delivery routes for faster transports.
trackingSection.feature8Text: Better management of vehicles and transport capacity.
trackingSection.feature9Text: Performance overview for drivers and delivery processes.
trackingSection.feature10Text: Clear evaluations and reports for deliveries.
trackingSection.feature11Text: Complete route tracking for maximum transparency.
trackingSection.feature12Text: Efficient planning of load capacity and vehicle space.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefitsSection.subtitle: Why choose us.
keyBenefitsSection.benefit2Description: Custom solutions for every shipment size.
keyBenefitsSection.benefit3Description: Years of experience in European logistics.
keyBenefitsSection.benefit4Description: Dedicated support from quote to delivery.

warehouseSection.title: Fleet & Transport Capacity
warehouseSection.subtitle: Professional vehicles for every transport need – from small packages to full loads. Choose the right capacity for your shipment.

howItWorksSection.title: How It Works
howItWorksSection.subtitle: From booking to delivery – our streamlined process ensures efficiency, transparency, and reliability at every step.
howItWorksSection.step1Description: Share your shipping details and requirements. Get an instant quote and confirm your booking with just a few clicks.
howItWorksSection.step2Description: Our intelligent system optimizes routes based on weight, volume, vehicle type, and delivery windows for maximum efficiency.
howItWorksSection.step3Description: Monitor your shipment live via our mobile app with GPS tracking, ETA updates, and instant notifications at every milestone.
howItWorksSection.step4Description: Receive immediate delivery confirmation with digital signatures, photo documentation, and timestamp for complete transparency.
howItWorksSection.step5Description: Access detailed performance reports, driver statistics, and comprehensive analytics to optimize your logistics operations.

whoIsItForSection.title: Who Is It For?
whoIsItForSection.subtitle: Whether you ship once or every day.

whatYouGetSection.title: Everything You Need for Seamless Logistics
whatYouGetSection.subtitle: We provide reliable transport solutions that make logistics simpler, more efficient, and more transparent. With professional transport services and modern tracking systems, businesses can move goods quickly and keep full visibility of shipments at all times.
whatYouGetSection.item1Description: Monitor shipments and delivery vehicles in real time for maximum transparency.
whatYouGetSection.item2Description: Reliable transport vehicles for the safe delivery of different shipment types.
whatYouGetSection.item3Description: Fast and reliable transport for urgent and time-critical deliveries.
whatYouGetSection.item4Description: Optimized delivery routes to improve efficiency and reduce transport time.
whatYouGetSection.item5Description: Planned transport routes for businesses with recurring delivery requirements.
whatYouGetSection.item6Description: Clear shipment updates and reports for better logistics management.

testimonialsSection.title: Customer Insights
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Trusted by companies across Europe.
testimonialsSection.quote1: A professional and dependable logistics partner. Our shipments are delivered safely and always on time.
testimonialsSection.quote2: Clear pricing and reliable delivery service. Communication is smooth and transparent at all times.
testimonialsSection.quote3: Outstanding support from start to finish. The team organizes transports efficiently and keeps us informed every step of the way.

caseStudiesSection.title: Success Stories from Our Clients
caseStudiesSection.subtitle: Real results from businesses that trust our professional transport and logistics services.
caseStudiesSection.case1Description: Our courier and local delivery services help businesses manage daily shipments efficiently with reliable pickup and on-time delivery.
caseStudiesSection.case2Description: Our refrigerated transport solutions ensure safe, temperature-controlled deliveries for goods that require a stable cold chain throughout transport.
caseStudiesSection.case3Description: With our freight forwarding and international shipping solutions, businesses can move goods smoothly across national and international routes.
caseStudiesSection.case4Title: Food Retail: Same-Day Fresh Delivery Network
caseStudiesSection.case4Description: Built a same-day delivery network for fresh food products with HACCP-compliant refrigerated transport.
caseStudiesSection.case5Title: Electronics: Express Direct Drives for Just-in-Time
caseStudiesSection.case5Description: Enabled JIT manufacturing with dedicated express direct drives and live GPS tracking for electronics components.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.q1: How can I book your logistics services?
faqSection.a1: You can contact our team to arrange transport services such as freight forwarding, courier service, refrigerated transport, or local deliveries. We plan the transport according to your requirements.
faqSection.q2: How can I track my shipments?
faqSection.a2: Shipments can be tracked via our tracking system so you can view the status of your delivery in real time at any time.
faqSection.a3: Yes, we offer international shipping and freight forwarding services so businesses can move goods efficiently across national and international routes.
faqSection.q4: What kinds of goods can you transport?
faqSection.a4: We transport a wide range of shipments such as parcels, pallets, business goods, and temperature-sensitive products through our refrigerated transport solutions.
faqSection.helpTitle: You Need Any Help? Get Free Consultation

contactMapSection.title: Contact With Us
contactMapSection.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...

newsletterSection.title: Stay Updated
newsletterSection.subtitle: Get logistics tips and offers in your inbox.
newsletterSection.privacyNote: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.

missionVisionSection.title: Mission & Vision
missionVisionSection.missionText: To deliver reliable, efficient logistics that help our customers grow — with transparency, care, and innovation at every step.
missionVisionSection.visionText: To be the preferred logistics partner across Europe, known for trust, sustainability, and seamless end-to-end solutions.

freight.heroSubtitle: National and international cargo transport with reliable capacity, transparent pricing, and real-time tracking across Europe.
freight.introP1: Our freight forwarding service connects your goods to destinations across Europe with a modern fleet and experienced dispatch team.
freight.introP2: From single pallets to full truckloads, we plan routes, manage loading, and ensure on-time delivery with proof of delivery.
freight.fleetSubtitle: Choose the right truck size for your shipment — from medium loads to full articulated trucks.
freight.fleet1Desc: Ideal for medium-sized deliveries and urban distribution.
freight.fleet2Desc: Versatile capacity for regional and national freight.
freight.fleet3Desc: Full truckload capacity for large-volume shipments.
freight.advantagesSubtitle: Reliable freight solutions built for B2B supply chains.
freight.advantage1Desc: On-time delivery rates backed by 20+ years of logistics expertise.
freight.advantage2Desc: Scale from single pallets to full truckloads without switching providers.
freight.advantage3Desc: Experienced planners for cross-border and national lanes.
freight.advantage4Desc: Personal dispatch contact from booking to proof of delivery.
freight.manageSubtitle: End-to-end control from dispatch to delivery confirmation.
freight.manage1Text: Route optimization and vehicle assignment based on cargo specs.
freight.manage2Text: Efficient loading sequences and secure cargo handling.
freight.manage4Text: Real-time updates via our tracking platform.
freight.stepsSubtitle: From quote to delivery in five clear steps.
freight.step1Desc: Share pickup, delivery, cargo details, and preferred dates.
freight.step2Desc: We confirm capacity, pricing, and transit time.
freight.step3Desc: Your cargo is collected and secured for transport.
freight.step4Desc: Track your shipment in real time until arrival.
freight.step5Desc: Goods delivered with proof of delivery documentation.
freight.useCase1Desc: Raw materials and finished goods between plants and warehouses.
freight.useCase2Desc: Regular pallet deliveries to retail and trade partners.
freight.useCase3Desc: Building materials and equipment to job sites on schedule.
freight.faq1Q: What cargo sizes do you handle?
freight.faq1A: From single pallets to full 40t truckloads — we match capacity to your shipment.
freight.faq2A: Yes, we operate across EU routes with customs documentation support.
freight.faq3Q: How quickly can I get a quote?
freight.faq3A: Most quotes are returned within 2 hours during business hours.
freight.faq4A: Yes, all freight shipments include access to our real-time tracking platform.
freight.formSubtitle: Tell us about your shipment and we will prepare a tailored offer.
freight.formMessagePlaceholder: Pickup address, delivery address, weight, dimensions, dates...
freight.ctaSubtitle: Get a competitive freight quote from our logistics experts today.

refrigerated.heroSubtitle: Reliable refrigerated transport for food, pharma, and sensitive goods with continuous temperature monitoring.
refrigerated.introP1: Our refrigerated fleet maintains precise temperature control from pickup to delivery, protecting sensitive cargo throughout transit.
refrigerated.introP2: With HACCP-compliant processes and 24/7 monitoring, we ensure your goods arrive in perfect condition.
refrigerated.fleetSubtitle: Modern refrigerated units for every cold chain requirement.
refrigerated.fleet1Desc: Standard refrigerated transport for uniform temperature cargo.
refrigerated.fleet2Desc: Dual-zone units for mixed temperature shipments.
refrigerated.advantagesSubtitle: Protecting your temperature-sensitive cargo at every mile.
refrigerated.advantage1Desc: Continuous sensors with instant deviation alerts.
refrigerated.advantage2Desc: Processes aligned with food safety standards.
refrigerated.manageSubtitle: Rigorous processes to maintain product integrity.
refrigerated.manage1Text: Units pre-cooled to required temperature before loading.
refrigerated.manage3Text: Backup plans for equipment or traffic disruptions.
refrigerated.manage4Text: Temperature logs and certificates on delivery.
refrigerated.stepsSubtitle: Five steps to secure refrigerated transport.
refrigerated.step1Desc: Share product type, temperature range, and volume.
refrigerated.step2Desc: We match the right vehicle to your cargo specs.
refrigerated.step3Desc: Unit reaches target temperature before loading begins.
refrigerated.step4Desc: Continuous tracking of temperature and location.
refrigerated.useCase1Desc: Fresh, frozen, and chilled products to retail and HORECA.
refrigerated.useCase2Desc: Medicines and vaccines requiring strict temperature control.
refrigerated.useCase3Desc: Flowers and plants needing climate-controlled transport.
refrigerated.faq1Q: What temperature ranges do you support?
refrigerated.faq1A: From -25°C frozen to +15°C chilled, depending on vehicle type.
refrigerated.faq2A: Yes, full temperature records are provided with every delivery.
refrigerated.faq3A: Yes, we operate GDP-validated units for pharma shipments.
refrigerated.faq4A: Our 24/7 team is alerted immediately and contingency plans are activated.
refrigerated.formSubtitle: Share your temperature requirements and we will find the right solution.
refrigerated.formMessagePlaceholder: Product type, temperature range, quantity, pickup and delivery...
refrigerated.ctaSubtitle: Protect your sensitive cargo with our refrigerated transport experts.

courier.heroSubtitle: Same-day and next-day courier service for documents, parcels, and urgent B2B shipments across local and regional routes.
courier.introP1: Our courier service delivers urgent shipments with pickup windows as fast as 30–120 minutes in supported areas.
courier.introP2: From documents to spare parts, we provide flexible pickup, live ETA updates, and proof of delivery.
courier.fleetSubtitle: Agile vehicles for fast urban and regional deliveries.
courier.fleet1Desc: Ultra-fast urban deliveries for small parcels.
courier.fleet2Desc: Standard courier vehicle for parcels and documents.
courier.fleet3Desc: Larger express loads for B2B urgent shipments.

courier.advantage2Desc: Time windows adapted to your business schedule.
courier.advantage3Desc: Digital signatures and photo confirmation on delivery.
courier.advantage4Desc: Strong network for regional express routes.
courier.manageSubtitle: Optimized dispatch for maximum speed and reliability.
courier.manage1Text: Nearest driver assigned within minutes of booking.
courier.manage2Text: Dynamic routing for fastest delivery times.
courier.manage4Text: SMS and email updates at key milestones.
courier.stepsSubtitle: Book and track your express delivery in four simple steps.

courier.step3Desc: Track your parcel with live ETA updates.
courier.step4Desc: Recipient signs with digital proof of delivery.
courier.useCase1Desc: Last-mile and same-day delivery for online orders.
courier.useCase2Desc: Urgent documents and contracts between offices.
courier.useCase3Desc: Spare parts and components to keep operations running.

courier.faq1A: In supported areas, pickup is available within 30–120 minutes.
courier.faq2A: Yes, same-day express delivery is available for eligible routes.
courier.faq3A: Documents, parcels, and B2B goods up to our vehicle capacity limits.
courier.faq4A: Yes, all courier shipments include live tracking and ETA updates.

regularTours.heroSubtitle: Predictable, recurring transport on fixed routes with dedicated capacity and consistent delivery windows for your business.
regularTours.introP1: For businesses with regular shipments, our fixed-route transport provides dependable schedules, dedicated vehicles, and transparent pricing.
regularTours.introP2: We design routes around your frequency, time windows, and volume — so your supply chain runs like clockwork.
regularTours.fleetSubtitle: Vehicles assigned to your recurring lanes for consistent capacity.
regularTours.fleet1Desc: Daily or weekly routes within regional networks.
regularTours.fleet3Desc: Full truckload recurring lanes for large volumes.
regularTours.advantagesSubtitle: Planable logistics for businesses with recurring shipments.
regularTours.advantage1Desc: Fixed pickup and delivery windows you can plan around.
regularTours.advantage2Desc: Transparent contract rates without surprise surcharges.
regularTours.advantage3Desc: Vehicles reserved for your routes and volumes.
regularTours.advantage4Desc: Optimized recurring lanes reduce transit variability.
regularTours.manageSubtitle: Structured planning for recurring transport excellence.
regularTours.manage1Text: Lanes designed for efficiency and consistent timing.
regularTours.manage2Text: Fixed time windows integrated into your operations.
regularTours.manage3Text: Automated scheduling for daily, weekly, or monthly runs.
regularTours.manage4Text: Monthly KPIs on on-time rates and volumes.

regularTours.step1Desc: Tell us your lanes, frequency, and time windows.

regularTours.step3Desc: Integration with your systems and contact setup.
regularTours.step4Desc: Scheduled collections begin on agreed calendar.
regularTours.useCase1Desc: Store replenishment on fixed daily or weekly schedules.
regularTours.useCase2Desc: Just-in-time parts delivery to production lines.
regularTours.useCase3Desc: Regular shipments between warehouses and partners.
regularTours.faq1Q: What is a fixed route contract?
regularTours.faq1A: An agreement for recurring transport on defined lanes with fixed schedules and pricing.
regularTours.faq2A: We agree fixed windows during contract setup and adjust with notice.
regularTours.faq3A: Yes, contracts can be updated to reflect volume or schedule changes.
regularTours.faq4A: Yes, monthly reports cover on-time rates, volumes, and incidents.
regularTours.formSubtitle: Share your routes, frequency, and volumes — we will prepare a tailored offer.
regularTours.formMessagePlaceholder: Route details, frequency, time windows, cargo type...

international.heroSubtitle: Road, sea, and air solutions for international shipments across Europe and beyond — with customs support and end-to-end visibility.
international.introP1: Our international shipping service combines multimodal transport with customs expertise to move your goods across borders efficiently.
international.introP2: Whether by road, sea, or air, we manage documentation, handoffs, and tracking from origin to final delivery.
international.fleetSubtitle: Choose the right mode for your international shipment.
international.fleet1Desc: Cross-border truck transport across European corridors.
international.fleet2Desc: FCL and LCL container shipping to global ports.
international.fleet3Desc: Express air freight for time-critical international shipments.
international.advantagesSubtitle: Seamless cross-border logistics from a single partner.
international.advantage2Desc: Road, sea, and air combined for optimal cost and speed.
international.advantage3Desc: Coverage across Europe and key global trade lanes.

international.manage2Text: Clearance support at import and export points.
international.manage3Text: Seamless transfers between road, sea, and air legs.
international.manage4Text: Visibility across customs and transit milestones.

international.useCase2Desc: Raw materials inbound and finished goods outbound globally.
international.useCase3Desc: International supply chains to warehouses and markets.

international.faq1A: We serve EU countries and key global destinations via sea and air partners.

international.faq3Q: Can I combine road and sea freight?
international.faq3A: Yes, we offer multimodal solutions with seamless handoffs between modes.

international.faq4A: Transit times vary by mode and destination — we provide estimates with every quote.

industriesPage.heroSubtitle: From retail fulfilment to pharmaceutical cold chain — Take & Bring delivers sector-specific transport, freight forwarding, and courier services tailored to your industry's compliance, speed, and reliability requirements.
industriesPage.introP1: Every industry faces unique transport challenges — temperature control for pharmaceuticals, just-in-time delivery for automotive, or high-volume distribution for retail. Generic logistics providers cannot meet these demands. Take & Bring combines deep sector knowledge with a modern fleet, real-time tracking, and dedicated account management to deliver logistics that fit your business model.
industriesPage.introP2: Whether you need express courier services, full truckload freight, refrigerated transport, or international shipping, our teams understand the regulations, timelines, and quality standards that matter in your sector. We partner with businesses across Germany, Romania, and the wider EU to optimise supply chains and reduce transport costs.
industriesPage.introHighlight2: Dedicated account managers per industry vertical
industriesPage.introHighlight3: Multimodal transport: road, courier, refrigerated, international
industriesPage.introHighlight4: Real-time tracking and proof of delivery on every shipment
industriesPage.gridSubtitle: Explore how we support leading sectors with tailored logistics solutions designed for operational excellence.
industriesPage.retailDesc: Last-mile delivery, fulfilment centre transfers, and peak-season capacity for online and brick-and-mortar retailers.
industriesPage.manufacturingDesc: Raw material inbound, finished goods outbound, and JIT delivery to production lines and distribution hubs.
industriesPage.foodDesc: Temperature-controlled transport for fresh, chilled, and frozen products with HACCP-compliant processes.
industriesPage.healthcareDesc: GDP-compliant pharmaceutical logistics with validated reefer units and full temperature documentation.
industriesPage.automotiveDesc: Just-in-time parts delivery, supplier lane management, and production line support across Europe.
industriesPage.constructionDesc: Heavy materials, equipment, and site deliveries with flexible scheduling and large-capacity vehicles.
industriesPage.technologyDesc: Secure handling of high-value electronics, components, and sensitive equipment with tracked express delivery.
industriesPage.agricultureDesc: Seasonal harvest transport, farm-to-market delivery, and refrigerated produce logistics across regions.
industriesPage.expertiseSubtitle: Industry-specific logistics is not one-size-fits-all. Our teams understand the operational, regulatory, and commercial realities of your sector.
industriesPage.expertise1Desc: GDP, HACCP, and customs documentation handled correctly for pharma, food, and international shipments.
industriesPage.expertise2Desc: Scale capacity for peak seasons, production ramps, and promotional campaigns without long-term commitments.
industriesPage.expertise3Desc: Route consolidation, fixed contracts, and multimodal planning to reduce your total cost of transport.
industriesPage.expertise4Desc: Industry-trained account managers who speak your language and understand your KPIs.
industriesPage.solutionsSubtitle: Select your sector to see recommended transport services and typical use cases.
industriesPage.metricsSubtitle: Measurable outcomes our sector clients achieve with Take & Bring logistics.
industriesPage.metric1Label: Average on-time delivery across all industries
industriesPage.metric1Desc: Consistent performance backed by route optimisation and real-time monitoring.
industriesPage.metric2Desc: Clients report lower transport spend through fixed routes and fleet right-sizing.
industriesPage.metric3Desc: Round-the-clock dispatch and customer service for time-critical industries.

industriesPage.step1Desc: We analyse your sector requirements, volumes, routes, and compliance needs.
industriesPage.step2Desc: A tailored logistics plan combining the right services, fleet, and schedules.

industriesPage.award1Desc: Quality management systems aligned with international logistics standards.
industriesPage.award2Desc: Full data protection compliance for shipment and customer information.
industriesPage.award3Desc: Food-grade cold chain processes for beverage and perishable logistics.
industriesPage.award4Desc: Licensed cross-border transport across European corridors.
industriesPage.trustSubtitle: Join hundreds of businesses that rely on Take & Bring for dependable sector logistics.
industriesPage.trust3: Real-time GPS tracking on every shipment
industriesPage.trust4: Multilingual support in DE, EN, and RO
industriesPage.faq1Q: Which industries does Take & Bring serve?
industriesPage.faq1A: We serve retail, manufacturing, food & beverage, healthcare, automotive, construction, technology, and agriculture — with tailored solutions for each sector.
industriesPage.faq2Q: Do you offer refrigerated transport for food and pharma?
industriesPage.faq2A: Yes. Our refrigerated fleet supports HACCP and GDP-compliant cold chain logistics with continuous temperature monitoring and documentation.
industriesPage.faq3Q: Can you handle peak season volume for retail?
industriesPage.faq3A: Absolutely. We scale courier and freight capacity for Black Friday, holidays, and promotional peaks with flexible scheduling.
industriesPage.faq4Q: Do you provide just-in-time delivery for automotive?
industriesPage.faq4A: Yes. Our regular tour and fixed-route services support JIT production line delivery with predictable schedules.
industriesPage.faq5Q: Is international shipping available for all industries?
industriesPage.faq5A: We offer road, sea, and air international freight with customs support for importers, exporters, and manufacturers.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Moving Europe Forward, One Delivery at a Time
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: For over two decades, Take & Bring has connected businesses and people across Germany, Romania, and the wider EU with reliable courier, freight, refrigerated, and international logistics. We are the partner that turns complex transport into simple, on-time delivery.
aboutPage.storyTitle: From a Single Van to a European Logistics Network
aboutPage.storyP1: Take & Bring began with a simple belief: that businesses deserve a logistics partner who treats every shipment as if it were their own. What started as a small regional courier operation has grown into a full-service logistics company moving freight across the entire European Union — without ever losing the personal, hands-on service our first customers came to trust.
aboutPage.storyP2: Today we combine a modern fleet of over 1,000 vehicles, real-time GPS tracking, and a multilingual team of logistics specialists to deliver courier, freight forwarding, refrigerated, fixed-route, and international transport. Every route we plan is built around one goal: getting your goods where they need to be, safely and on time.
aboutPage.storyHighlight2: Headquartered in Germany with strong Romanian operations
aboutPage.storyHighlight4: Dedicated account managers for every client
aboutPage.missionSubheading: Our mission and vision shape every route we plan, every truck we dispatch, and every promise we keep.
aboutPage.missionText: To make logistics effortless for our clients by delivering dependable, transparent, and flexible transport solutions — combining the speed of a courier, the capacity of a freight forwarder, and the care of a trusted partner.
aboutPage.visionText: To be the most trusted logistics partner in Europe, recognised for on-time reliability, sustainable operations, and a relentless commitment to the success of the businesses we serve.
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: These principles guide how we work with clients, partners, and each other — every single day.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We do what we say. On-time delivery isn't a target — it's our standard, backed by route optimisation and live tracking.
aboutPage.value2Desc: From same-day courier to express freight, we move fast without ever compromising on safety or quality.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We treat your business as our own, building long-term relationships rather than one-off transactions.
aboutPage.value4Desc: Real-time tracking, clear pricing, and honest communication at every stage of the journey.
aboutPage.value5Desc: Our experienced, multilingual team is the engine behind every successful delivery.
aboutPage.value6Desc: Smarter routes, modern vehicles, and consolidated loads to reduce emissions and waste.

europe-freight-forwarding-guide.title: Freight Forwarding in Europe: A Complete 2026 Guide
europe-freight-forwarding-guide.excerpt: Everything businesses need to know about road freight forwarding across the EU — from FTL vs LTL to choosing the right partner and cutting transit times.
europe-freight-forwarding-guide.author: Take & Bring Team
europe-freight-forwarding-guide.metaTitle: Freight Forwarding in Europe: Complete 2026 Guide
europe-freight-forwarding-guide.metaDescription: A complete guide to road freight forwarding in Europe: FTL vs LTL, transit times, costs, customs, and how to choose the right freight partner for your business.
europe-freight-forwarding-guide.intro: Freight forwarding is the backbone of European trade, moving everything from raw materials to finished goods across borders every day. Yet for many businesses, choosing the right freight strategy still feels complicated. This guide breaks down how modern road freight forwarding works in the EU and how to make it work for you.

sections.heading: What is freight forwarding?
body: A freight forwarder organises the transport of goods on behalf of shippers, coordinating carriers, routes, documentation, and delivery. Rather than managing multiple carriers yourself, you work with one partner who plans the most efficient way to move your cargo.
In Europe, road freight remains the dominant mode for both domestic and cross-border shipments thanks to its flexibility, speed, and dense motorway network connecting every major market.

sections.heading: FTL vs LTL: which one fits your shipment?
body: Full Truckload (FTL) means your goods occupy an entire vehicle. It's the fastest and most secure option for large or time-sensitive shipments, with no transfers along the way.

Less Than Truckload (LTL) consolidates your goods with other shipments, so you only pay for the space you use. It's cost-effective for smaller volumes that don't require a dedicated truck, though transit times can be slightly longer.

sections.heading: How to choose the right freight partner
body: Look for a forwarder with a modern, mixed fleet (from 7.5t vans to 40t trucks), real-time tracking, and proven cross-border experience. Transparent pricing and a dedicated account manager make a measurable difference to reliability.
Ask about on-time delivery rates, insurance coverage, and how they handle customs for non-EU lanes. A strong partner reduces your administrative burden while protecting your goods end to end.

takeaways: Road freight is the most flexible and widely used transport mode in Europe.
Choose FTL for large or urgent loads, LTL for smaller, cost-sensitive shipments.
Prioritise partners with real-time tracking and transparent pricing.
A dedicated account manager dramatically improves reliability and response times.

cold-chain-best-practices.title: Cold Chain Logistics: 7 Best Practices for Temperature-Sensitive Goods
cold-chain-best-practices.excerpt: How to protect food, pharmaceuticals, and perishables in transit with proven cold chain practices, from pre-cooling to continuous temperature monitoring.
cold-chain-best-practices.author: Take & Bring Team
cold-chain-best-practices.metaTitle: Cold Chain Logistics: 7 Best Practices for 2026
cold-chain-best-practices.metaDescription: Protect temperature-sensitive goods in transit. Learn 7 cold chain best practices for food and pharma logistics: pre-cooling, monitoring, HACCP, GDP, and more.
cold-chain-best-practices.intro: An unbroken cold chain is non-negotiable for food, pharmaceuticals, and other perishables. A single temperature excursion can spoil an entire load or compromise patient safety. These seven best practices keep your temperature-sensitive goods safe from pickup to delivery.

sections.heading: Start with pre-cooling and validation
body: Refrigerated vehicles should be pre-cooled to the target temperature before loading, not after. Loading warm cargo into a warm trailer forces the unit to work harder and risks an early excursion.
Validated reefer units and calibrated sensors ensure the temperature you set is the temperature your goods actually experience throughout the journey.

sections.heading: Monitor continuously and document everything
body: Continuous temperature monitoring with real-time alerts lets dispatchers react before a deviation becomes a loss. Modern telematics record the full temperature history of every shipment.
Complete documentation isn't just good practice — it's a regulatory requirement under HACCP for food and GDP for pharmaceuticals. A clear audit trail protects you and your customers.

sections.heading: Train people and plan for the unexpected
body: Even the best equipment fails without trained drivers and handlers who understand loading patterns, door-opening discipline, and emergency procedures.
Build contingency into your routes: backup vehicles, alternate plans for breakdowns, and clear escalation paths keep the chain intact when things go wrong.

takeaways: Always pre-cool the vehicle before loading temperature-sensitive cargo.
Use validated reefer units and calibrated, continuously monitored sensors.
Maintain full temperature documentation for HACCP and GDP compliance.
Train staff and build contingency plans to handle the unexpected.

same-day-courier-business.title: When Same-Day Courier Service Makes Business Sense
same-day-courier-business.excerpt: Same-day delivery isn't just for emergencies. Discover the scenarios where express courier service protects revenue, relationships, and reputation.
same-day-courier-business.author: Take & Bring Team
same-day-courier-business.metaTitle: When Same-Day Courier Service Makes Business Sense
same-day-courier-business.metaDescription: Discover when same-day and express courier service is worth it for your business — from production line stoppages to high-value goods and customer-critical deliveries.
same-day-courier-business.intro: Same-day courier service often gets pigeonholed as an expensive last resort. In reality, for the right situations it's one of the smartest logistics investments a business can make. Here's when express delivery pays for itself many times over.

sections.heading: Preventing costly production stoppages
body: A missing component can halt an entire production line, costing thousands per hour. A same-day courier delivering that one critical part is trivial by comparison.
Just-in-time manufacturers increasingly rely on express courier as an insurance policy against supply gaps that would otherwise idle expensive equipment and staff.

sections.heading: High-value, sensitive, and time-critical goods
body: Documents, prototypes, medical samples, and high-value electronics often can't wait — or can't risk sitting in a multi-stop network. Direct, dedicated courier delivery keeps them secure and traceable.
With a single driver and no transfers, same-day courier minimises handling, reduces loss risk, and provides a clear chain of custody.

sections.heading: Protecting customer relationships
body: When a key customer needs something urgently, the ability to say yes can define the relationship. Reliable same-day delivery turns a potential complaint into a loyalty moment.
The cost of express delivery is almost always lower than the cost of a lost contract or a damaged reputation.

takeaways: Same-day courier prevents production stoppages that cost far more than delivery.
It's ideal for high-value, sensitive, or time-critical goods needing a clear chain of custody.
Express delivery can turn urgent customer requests into loyalty-building moments.
Weigh courier cost against the real cost of delay, not the standard shipping rate.

fixed-routes-supply-chain.title: How Fixed Routes Bring Predictability to Your Supply Chain
fixed-routes-supply-chain.excerpt: Scheduled, recurring transport on fixed routes gives your supply chain the one thing it craves most: predictability. Here's how it works.
fixed-routes-supply-chain.author: Take & Bring Team
fixed-routes-supply-chain.metaTitle: How Fixed Routes Bring Predictability to Your Supply Chain
fixed-routes-supply-chain.metaDescription: Fixed-route, scheduled transport gives your supply chain predictable capacity and lower costs. Learn how regular tours work and when they're the right choice.
fixed-routes-supply-chain.intro: Volatility is the enemy of efficient logistics. Fixed-route transport — also called regular tours — replaces uncertainty with a dependable, recurring schedule that your whole operation can plan around. Here's why more businesses are locking in regular tours.

sections.heading: What are fixed routes?
body: A fixed route is a pre-agreed transport schedule that runs on set days between set locations. Instead of booking transport ad hoc, you secure guaranteed, recurring capacity.
This model suits businesses with steady, predictable volumes — manufacturers feeding production lines, retailers replenishing stores, or distributors serving regular customers.

sections.heading: The benefits of predictable capacity
body: With fixed routes, you always know when your goods will move and arrive. That predictability lets you tighten inventory, plan staffing, and make firm promises to your own customers.
Because the carrier can plan and optimise these recurring runs in advance, fixed routes are typically more cost-effective than repeated spot bookings.

sections.heading: Is a fixed route right for you?
body: If you ship similar volumes on similar lanes week after week, a fixed route almost always reduces cost and stress. The more regular your flow, the bigger the savings.
A good logistics partner will analyse your shipping patterns and design a schedule that matches your real demand, with flexibility to scale during peaks.

takeaways: Fixed routes provide guaranteed, recurring transport capacity on a set schedule.
Predictability enables tighter inventory and reliable customer commitments.
Recurring runs are usually cheaper than repeated ad-hoc spot bookings.
They suit any business with steady, predictable volumes on regular lanes.

international-shipping-customs.title: International Shipping & Customs: Avoiding the 5 Most Common Delays
international-shipping-customs.excerpt: Cross-border shipping delays are usually avoidable. Learn the five most common customs pitfalls and how to keep your international freight moving.
international-shipping-customs.author: Take & Bring Team
international-shipping-customs.metaTitle: International Shipping & Customs: Avoid 5 Common Delays
international-shipping-customs.metaDescription: Avoid the most common customs delays in international shipping. Learn how documentation, classification, and the right partner keep cross-border freight on schedule.
international-shipping-customs.intro: International shipping opens markets, but customs can turn a smooth journey into a costly wait. The good news: most border delays come from a handful of avoidable mistakes. Here are the five most common — and how to prevent them.

sections.heading: Incomplete or inaccurate documentation
body: The single biggest cause of customs delays is paperwork. Missing commercial invoices, incorrect values, or mismatched details between documents trigger inspections and holds.
Accurate, complete, and consistent documentation — prepared before the goods reach the border — keeps clearance fast and predictable.

sections.heading: Wrong commodity classification
body: Every product needs the correct HS (Harmonised System) code. An incorrect code can mean wrong duties, fines, or seized goods.
Work with a partner who understands tariff classification for your products, especially if you ship a varied or technical range.

sections.heading: Underestimating duties, taxes, and lead times
body: Surprise duties and taxes stall shipments when no one is ready to pay them. Know your landed costs in advance and agree who is responsible under the correct Incoterms.
Build realistic customs lead times into your planning. The right forwarder pre-clears where possible and keeps you informed at every step.

takeaways: Most customs delays come from incomplete or inconsistent documentation.
Always use the correct HS classification code for every product.
Know your landed costs and Incoterms before goods ship.
A customs-experienced forwarder prevents the most common border holds.

reduce-logistics-costs.title: 8 Practical Ways to Reduce Your Logistics Costs
reduce-logistics-costs.excerpt: Logistics spend doesn't have to keep climbing. These eight practical strategies help businesses cut transport costs without sacrificing service.
reduce-logistics-costs.author: Take & Bring Team
reduce-logistics-costs.metaTitle: 8 Practical Ways to Reduce Your Logistics Costs in 2026
reduce-logistics-costs.metaDescription: Cut transport spend without sacrificing service. 8 practical strategies to reduce logistics costs: consolidation, fixed routes, fleet right-sizing, and more.
reduce-logistics-costs.intro: For most businesses, logistics is one of the largest controllable costs — and one of the most overlooked when it comes to savings. With a few smart changes, you can cut transport spend while improving reliability. Here are eight strategies that deliver real results.

sections.heading: Consolidate shipments and right-size your fleet
body: Combining smaller shipments into fuller loads reduces cost per unit and cuts the number of trips. Consolidation is one of the fastest ways to lower spend immediately.
Matching vehicle size to the load avoids paying for empty space. The right mix of van and truck capacity keeps every kilometre efficient.

sections.heading: Use fixed routes and optimise planning
body: Recurring fixed-route contracts are typically cheaper than repeated spot bookings, because carriers can plan and fill them efficiently.
Route optimisation — sequencing stops intelligently and reducing empty running — trims fuel, time, and labour on every journey.

sections.heading: Partner strategically and track performance
body: Consolidating your transport with one capable partner often unlocks better rates and simpler management than juggling many carriers.
What gets measured gets managed. Tracking on-time rates, cost per shipment, and utilisation reveals exactly where further savings hide.

takeaways: Consolidate shipments and right-size vehicles to cut cost per unit.
Fixed-route contracts beat repeated spot bookings on price.
Route optimisation reduces fuel, time, and empty running.
Track KPIs and consolidate with one strong partner for the best rates.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Take & Bring, protecting your personal data is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have. It applies to our website and the services we provide.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are
body: Take & Bring GmbH, based in Bergisch Gladbach, Germany, is the controller responsible for the processing of your personal data described in this policy.
You can reach us by email at info@take-bring.eu or by phone at +49 2234 6889977 for any data protection questions.

sections.heading: 2. What data we collect
body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and message when you submit a contact or quote request form.
We also collect limited technical data automatically, such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited, to operate and improve the website.

sections.heading: 3. How we use your data
body: We use your data to respond to your enquiries, prepare quotes, provide our logistics services, and communicate with you about your shipments.
We process this data on the basis of your consent, the performance of a contract, and our legitimate interest in operating our business and website.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing your data
body: We do not sell your personal data. We only share it with trusted service providers and carriers where necessary to deliver our services, and with authorities where required by law.
Any partners who process data on our behalf are bound by appropriate data protection agreements.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention
body: We keep your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described here, including any legal, accounting, or reporting obligations.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data, as well as the right to data portability and to object to processing.
To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@take-bring.eu. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
body: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to ensure it functions correctly and to understand how it is used. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to this policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page with the date of the last update.

sections.heading: Responsible for content

sections.heading: Liability for content
body: The contents of our pages have been created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general law.

sections.heading: Liability for links
body: Our website may contain links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. We therefore cannot accept any liability for this external content.
The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.

sections.heading: Copyright
